name: senpai-ask
description: A patient senior-colleague skill collection for Claude Code / Codex CLI — asks before it builds.

plugins.name: senpai-ask
plugins.description: A lightweight skill collection that turns Claude Code / Codex CLI into a patient senior-colleague guide for total beginners — asks before it builds, brainstorms before building, works in an isolated workspace, breaks work into small reviewed steps, and remembers your project across sessions in plain language.
